item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-006","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant woke up to the framing issue before polishing: it explicitly warned against sending the premise that growth stagnation was caused by competitor copying, identified it as conclusion-first and evidence-sensitive, and noted CEO follow-up risk. It then reframed the message as a hypothesis needing validation plus concrete next steps, rather than merely rewriting the original claim."}
